calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Continued To May-15-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Plaintiff Sue Williams' Motion To Compel Defendant Hsinhong Yeh To Answer Question Posed At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Nov-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANDREW WESTLEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-362-2817 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHON M. SPINELLI OF RMKB, TEL. NO. 1-650-780-1644 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - Plaintiff Sue Williams' Motion To Compel Defendant Hsinhong Yeh To Answer Question Posed At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction - Motion to compel is Granted. Request for Sanction is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Pro-tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/jpt

Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Hsinhong Yeh To Answer Question Posed At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction
Off Calendar Oct-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SUE WILLIAMS' Motion To Compel Defendant Hsinhong Yeh To Answer Question Posed At Deposition, And For A Monetary Sanction is transferred to depart 301 to be heard on November 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-21-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Attorney Michon M. Spinelli of Lawyers Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley 650-364-8200 for Defendants HSIN HONG YEH, TAMMIE YEH the moving party.
Attorney Andrew E. Westley 415-362-2817 for Plaintiff Sue Williams the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANT HSINHONG YEH, TAMMIE YEH Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint; the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is DENIED. Request for punitive damages is sufficiently supported by factual allegations re: fraud and conscious disregard of Plaintiff's rights and safety. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
